title: Bare Root Purple Climbing Rose 'Indigoletta' – Stunning, Hardy Climber for Garden Borders, Pathways & Vertical Garden Design
features: Shipped as Bare Root: The rose is carefully wrapped with its original soil to protect the roots during shipping. Upon arrival, it will be 35-45cm tall and will grow to a mature height of 90-120cm, depending on care and growing conditions.
Indigoletta climbs with mesmerizing purple blooms, creating a striking and captivating display.
With its mature growth and strong climbing habit, Indigoletta promises a breathtaking and enduring show.
Ideal for adding depth and allure to garden landscapes, Indigoletta adds a touch of mystery and sophistication to outdoor spaces.
Planting Time: Jan - May, Sept - Nov
